name: Managing Customers

This area offers a complete 360° customer profile, including order history, subscription preferences, tags, engagement levels, and support interactions — helping you understand and manage every customer more effectively."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Customers","bold":true},{"text":" section in Commerce Cloud is designed to give you an in-depth understanding of each Tags allow you to "},{"text":"segment and classify customers","bold":true},{"text":" based on behavior, purchase habits, or internal use cases."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can filter customers by tags (e.g. “VIP”, “Wholesale”, “Newsletter Subscriber”, “Escalated Ticket History" or "Frequent No-Show") to build customer segments."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If no tags are assigned, you'll see:
"},{"text":"No contact tags to show.","code":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" 
Merchants can add or remove tags, based on the requirement for more personalised and effecting communication and customer handling. "},{"text":"Email Subscription (0)","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Shows the number of email lists the customer is currently part of. If none, this shows (0)."}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"2. "},{"text":"SMS Subscription (0)","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Displays the number of SMS campaigns or lists the customer is subscribed to."}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"3. "},{"text":"Add to Lists Button","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Allows you to add the customer to one or more contact lists (e.g., promotional campaigns, re-engagement flows, etc.)."}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"4. "},{"text":"Do Not Contact Preferences","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Add to Do Not Email List","bold":true},{"text":"
Toggle ON to prevent all email communications from being sent to this customer.

It looks at how recently a customer interacted with your store, how often they engage or buy, how much they spend, and how they respond to emails or messages."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Based on these signals, customers are automatically grouped as "},{"text":"Active","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"At Risk","bold":true},{"text":", or "},{"text":"Inactive","bold":true},{"text":", with an engagement level such as "},{"text":"Engaged","italic":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"Not Engaged","italic":true},{"text":". This makes it easier to identify loyal customers, detect churn early, and run targeted retention or re-engagement campaigns without manual analysis."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3935C6L9WWVR/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3935C6L9WWVR/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":956089,"width":2880,"height":1608,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F3935C6L9WWVR%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":1755,"dateInserted":"2025-12-12T10:18:31+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Most Engaging Keywords","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This section highlights the "},{"text":"top keywords","bold":true},{"text":" that have captured the customer's attention across email campaigns and website integrations."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"These keywords are typically derived from clicks, views, or interactions in past emails."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use case","bold":true,"italic":true},{"text":":","italic":true},{"text":" Knowing which keywords resonate most with a customer allows marketers to craft personalized content and subject lines that improve open and click-through rates."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Customer Summary Dashboard","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Customer Summary Dashboard","bold":true},{"text":" provides a unified view of each individual customer's journey with your business. It consolidates critical data points such as communication engagement, order behavior, support history, and marketing performance — all in one place. This dashboard is designed to help teams make informed decisions quickly by offering context-rich insights at a glance."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The dashboard is divided into "},{"text":"five core sections","bold":true},{"text":", each accessible via tabs at the top of the customer profile:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true},{"text":" – Engagement summaries, order stats, and ticket status"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Campaigns","bold":true},{"text":" – Marketing campaign history and performance"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Tickets","bold":true},{"text":" – All past and ongoing support interactions"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Orders","bold":true},{"text":" – Full order history with values and frequency"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Abandoned Cart List","bold":true},{"text":" – Carts left behind and their potential recovery
